events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: pipe bedding & backfill, observed field condition is rocks against pipe with no bedding sand. This is non-compliant. IPC 306 requires proper bedding and backfill, no rocks/debris against pipe. Work is rough-complete. Decision: fail. Risk: high (pipe damage). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence high.
